comment: "This course appears to cover critical aspects of clinical reasoning, trauma management, and knot-tying techniques, all of which are essential for surgical practice."
"All aspects of the course are very interesting and I can attest that I gained some knowledge. Thanks."
"The practical demonstrations and real-world case studies made the concepts easier to understand and apply."
"The fact that the course was offered for people who are right handed and left handed was interesting and insightful."
"Crisp and accurate. The type of content that is to be advocated by attendings and consultants."
"You did a great job in organising this course content and the platform was wow. Keep it up."
"I found this course correcting my longstanding mistake of not crossing hands while doing one handed knot."
